entity.summary: India-focused centralized cryptocurrency exchange that suspended operations after a July 2024 USD 230-235 million hack, restarted trading in October 2025 following a Singapore High Court-sanctioned restructuring scheme, and continued expanding trading and infrastructure during 2026.
entity.notes: Do not mark dead. The exchange restarted spot trading in phases from 2025-10-24 and official Q1 2026 reporting confirms continued platform, infrastructure, security, and product development after the restructuring.

expected.summary: India-focused centralized cryptocurrency exchange that suspended operations after a July 2024 USD 230-235 million hack, then restarted trading in October 2025 after a Singapore High Court-sanctioned restructuring scheme. It remains active but carries major hack, suspension, restructuring, and restart events.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. The platform had a long suspension after the 2024 hack, but official and news sources confirm court-sanctioned restructuring and phased restart in October 2025.

changes.summary: India-focused centralized cryptocurrency exchange that suspended operations after a July 2024 USD 230-235 million hack, restarted trading in October 2025 following a Singapore High Court-sanctioned restructuring scheme, and continued expanding trading and infrastructure during 2026.
changes.notes: Do not mark dead. The exchange restarted spot trading in phases from 2025-10-24 and official Q1 2026 reporting confirms continued platform, infrastructure, security, and product development after the restructuring.

evidence.title: Trading to Resume on WazirX with Zero Trading Fee from 24th October
evidence.notes: First-party announcement of the phased trading restart beginning on 2025-10-24.

evidence.title: Q1 2026 At A Glance
evidence.notes: First-party review confirming active trading markets, infrastructure improvements, security work, and product expansion in Q1 2026.
